title: Keto Borscht Stew
description: A low-carb twist on the traditional Ukrainian beet-based soup. This keto version replaces the vegetables with a rich flavorful broth.
instructions: 1. In a large Dutch oven, cook the beef over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the cure and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the sliced beets, tomato paste, and bone broth. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Use an immersion blender to puree the stew until smooth.
6. Stir in the bacon fat and chopped parsley.
7. Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
